data.title: Deckers Outdoor Delivers Better-Than-Expected Q2 Earnings Led By Strength In HOKA, UGG Brands
data.description: Deckers reported second-quarter revenue of $1.31 billion, beating analyst estimates of $1.2 billion. The casual footwear and apparel company reported second-quarter earnings of $1.59, beating analyst estimates of $1.23 per share, according to Benzinga Pro.
